children.heading: Diesel fuel and special motor fuels
children.label: a Diesel fuel and special motor fuels

children.heading: Tax on diesel fuel and kerosene in certain cases
children.label: 1 Tax on diesel fuel and kerosene in certain cases
i
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of a diesel-powered highway vehicle or a diesel-powered train for use as a fuel in such vehicle or train, or

children.label: ii
children.text: used by any person as a fuel in a diesel-powered highway vehicle or a diesel-powered train unless there was a taxable sale of such fuel under clause (i).

children.heading: Exemption for previously taxed fuel
children.label: B Exemption for previously taxed fuel
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this paragraph on the sale or use of any liquid if tax was imposed on such liquid under section 4081 (other than such tax at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate) and the tax thereon was not credited or refunded.

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this subparagraph, the rate of the tax imposed by this paragraph shall be the rate of tax specified in section 4081(a)(2)(A) on diesel fuel which is in effect at the time of such sale or use.

children.label: ii Rate of tax on trains
I
children.text: 3.3 cents per gallon after , and before ,December 31, 2004July 1, 2005

children.label: III
children.text: 0 after .December 31, 2006

children.heading: Rate of tax on certain buses
children.label: iii Rate of tax on certain buses

children.heading: In general
children.label: I In general
children.text: Except as provided in subclause (II), in the case of fuel sold for use or used in a use described in section 6427(b)(1) (after the application of section 6427(b)(3)), the rate of tax imposed by this paragraph shall be 7.3 cents per gallon (4.3 cents per gallon after ).September 30, 2028

children.heading: School bus and intracity transportation
children.label: II School bus and intracity transportation
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this paragraph on any sale for use, or use, described in subparagraph (B) or (C) of section 6427(b)(2).

children.label: i
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of a motor vehicle or motorboat for use as a fuel in such motor vehicle or motorboat, or

children.label: ii
children.text: used by any person as a fuel in a motor vehicle or motorboat unless there was a taxable sale of such liquid under clause (i).

children.label: i
children.text: except as otherwise provided in this subparagraph, the rate of tax specified in section 4081(a)(2)(A)(i) which is in effect at the time of such sale or use,

children.label: ii
children.text: in the case of liquefied petroleum gas, 18.3 cents per energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline,

children.label: iii
children.text: in the case of any liquid fuel (other than ethanol and methanol) derived from coal (including peat) and liquid hydrocarbons derived from biomass (as defined in section 45K(c)(3)), 24.3 cents per gallon, and

children.label: iv
children.text: in the case of liquefied natural gas, 24.3 cents per energy equivalent of a gallon of diesel.

children.heading: Energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline
children.label: C Energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline” means, with respect to a liquefied petroleum gas fuel, the amount of such fuel having a Btu content of 115,400 (lower heating value). For purposes of the preceding sentence, a Btu content of 115,400 (lower heating value) is equal to 5.75 pounds of liquefied petroleum gas.

children.heading: Energy equivalent of a gallon of diesel
children.label: D Energy equivalent of a gallon of diesel
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “energy equivalent of a gallon of diesel” means, with respect to a liquefied natural gas fuel, the amount of such fuel having a Btu content of 128,700 (lower heating value). For purposes of the preceding sentence, a Btu content of 128,700 (lower heating value) is equal to 6.06 pounds of liquefied natural gas.

children.label: i
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of a motor vehicle or motorboat for use as a fuel in such motor vehicle or motorboat, or

children.label: ii
children.text: used by any person as a fuel in a motor vehicle or motorboat unless there was a taxable sale of such gas under clause (i).

children.heading: Bus uses
children.label: B Bus uses
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this paragraph on any sale for use, or use, described in subparagraph (B) or (C) of section 6427(b)(2) (relating to school bus and intracity transportation).

children.heading: Administrative provisions
children.label: C Administrative provisions
children.text: For purposes of applying this title with respect to the taxes imposed by this subsection, references to any liquid subject to tax under this subsection shall be treated as including references to compressed natural gas subject to tax under this paragraph, and references to gallons shall be treated as including references to energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline with respect to such gas.

children.heading: Energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline
children.label: D Energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline
children.text: For purposes of this paragraph, the term “energy equivalent of a gallon of gasoline” means 5.66 pounds of compressed natural gas.

children.heading: Exemption for off-highway business use; reduction in tax for qualified methanol and ethanol fuel
children.label: b Exemption for off-highway business use; reduction in tax for qualified methanol and ethanol fuel

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by subsection (a) on liquids sold for use or used in an off-highway business use.

children.heading: Tax where other use
children.label: B Tax where other use
children.text: If a liquid on which no tax was imposed by reason of subparagraph (A) is used otherwise than in an off-highway business use, a tax shall be imposed by paragraph (1)(B), (2)(B), or (3)(A)(ii) of subsection (a) (whichever is appropriate) and by the corresponding provision of subsection (d)(1) (if any).

children.heading: Off-highway business use defined
children.label: C Off-highway business use defined
children.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term “off-highway business use” has the meaning given to such term by section 6421(e)(2); except that such term shall not, for purposes of subsection (a)(1), include use in a diesel-powered train.

children.label: i

children.label: ii
children.text: subsection (d)(1) shall be applied by substituting “0.05 cent” for “0.1 cent” with respect to the sales and uses to which clause (i) applies.

children.heading: Qualified methanol and ethanol fuel produced from coal
children.label: B Qualified methanol and ethanol fuel produced from coal
children.text: The term “qualified methanol or ethanol fuel” means any liquid at least 85 percent of which consists of methanol, ethanol, or other alcohol produced from coal (including peat).

children.label: ii

children.heading: Termination
children.label: D Termination
children.text: On and after , subparagraph (A) shall not apply.January 1, 2009

children.heading: Certain liquids used as a fuel in aviation
children.label: c Certain liquids used as a fuel in aviation
A
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of an aircraft for use in such aircraft, or

children.label: B
children.text: used by any person in an aircraft unless there was a taxable sale of such fuel under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Exemption for previously taxed fuel
children.label: 2 Exemption for previously taxed fuel
children.text: No tax shall be imposed by this subsection on the sale or use of any liquid for use as a fuel other than aviation gasoline if tax was imposed on such liquid under section 4081 (other than such tax at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate) and the tax thereon was not credited or refunded.

children.heading: Rate of tax
children.label: 3 Rate of tax
children.text: The rate of tax imposed by this subsection shall be 21.8 cents per gallon (4.3 cents per gallon with respect to any sale or use for commercial aviation).

children.heading: Additional taxes to fund Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund
children.label: d Additional taxes to fund Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund

children.heading: Tax on sales and uses subject to tax under subsection (a)
children.label: 1 Tax on sales and uses subject to tax under subsection (a)
children.text: In addition to the taxes imposed by subsection (a), there is hereby imposed a tax of 0.1 cent a gallon on the sale or use of any liquid (other than liquefied petroleum gas and other than liquefied natural gas) if tax is imposed by subsection (a)(1) or (2) on such sale or use. No tax shall be imposed under the preceding sentence on the sale or use of any liquid if tax was imposed with respect to such liquid under section 4081 at the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate.

children.label: A
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of an aircraft for use as a fuel in such aircraft, or

children.label: B
children.text: used by any person as a fuel in an aircraft unless there was a taxable sale of such liquid under subparagraph (A).

children.label: A
children.text: sold by any person to an owner, lessee, or other operator of a diesel-powered train for use as a fuel in such train, or

children.label: B
children.text: used by any person as a fuel in a diesel-powered train unless there was a taxable sale of such fuel under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: Termination
children.label: 4 Termination
children.text: The taxes imposed by this subsection shall not apply during any period during which the Leaking Underground Storage Tank Trust Fund financing rate under section 4081 does not apply.

children.heading: Nonapplication of exemptions other than for exports
children.label: 5 Nonapplication of exemptions other than for exports
children.text: For purposes of this section, the tax imposed under this subsection shall be determined without regard to subsections (b)(1)(A), (f), (g), (h), and (). children.text: Under regulations prescribed by the Secretary, no tax shall be imposed under this section on any liquid sold for use or used on a farm for farming purposes.

children.label: 2 Use on a farm for farming purposes
children.text: For purposes of paragraph (1) of this subsection, use on a farm for farming purposes shall be determined in accordance with paragraphs (1), (2), and (3) of section 6420(c).
